published_prior_art.cite: BalkePearl1997 and RichardsonRobins2010: binary-IV bounds/geometry as finite latent-response linear programs

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_late_bounded_defiers/one_sided_compliance targets one-sided complier-LATE; pid_dynamic_iv_compliance_v2 targets dynamic assignment-memory mixture splitting

published_prior_art.cite: closest are BalkePearl1997, Noack2021, Yap2022, Picchetti2026, and BaiHuangMoonShaikhVytlacil2024; none verified as giving a simultaneous defier-cap/never-taker-cap ATE facet catalogue

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_late_bounded_defiers/one_sided_compliance was rejected for missing the full four-cell system

published_prior_art.cite: BalkePearl1997 and RichardsonRobins2010 use latent-response sharpness geometry, but not the proposed two-cap boundary-map catalogue

repo_prior_art.cite: imbens_angrist_late: monotone Wald/LATE coordinate; manski_nonparametric_bounds: bounded-outcome support interval

published_prior_art.cite: ImbensAngrist1994 and Manski1990 supply the two limiting objects; the embedding as faces of the new polytope is only a sanity reduction

structure_flags.label: Introduction
structure_flags.one_line: Section 4 has five required subparagraphs, but the required separate 'how research benefits from the conclusion' paragraph is missing.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship; to lift, the proposal needs an explicit frontier against BaiHuangMoonShaikhVytlacil2024 showing when the two caps strictly shrink Balke-Pearl bounds despite treatment-response-only no-power results.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1 / Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: Assumption compatibility is stated before imposing the caps, so the capped polytope may be empty; endpoint minima/maxima and facet formulae need a cap-compatible nonemptiness assumption.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The pure never-taker face imposes pi_N=1 while Assumption caps still imposes pi_N <= nu_bar; the reduction needs nu_bar=1 or an explicit statement that the cap is disabled/saturated on this face.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add a cap-compatible feasibility assumption, preferably equivalently stated as the induced one-dimensional principal-stratum parameter interval after the four q-cells and the two caps are imposed.
Add the missing Introduction paragraph and make it name the exact research payoff: active-facet inference, Bai-style identifying-power frontier, or a reusable sensitivity-analysis diagnostic.
Strengthen Conjecture 1 with a strict-shrinkage corollary: characterize observable/cap regimes where the never-taker cap changes the Balke-Pearl endpoint and regimes where it is redundant.
Add BaiHuangMoonShaikhVytlacil2024 to the load-bearing checklist and explain why the proposed cap pair escapes or complements their generalized-monotonicity no-identifying-power frontier.

recommended_next_step: Revise the proposal around capped-feasibility, the missing introduction paragraph, and a Bai-frontier strict-shrinkage statement strong enough to justify the flagship target.
